name: Dutch Oven Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 8 carrots, peeled and cut into 2-inch chunks
8 oz fresh okra (or 10 oz frozen package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the carrots into 2-inch chunks.
2. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
3. In a Dutch oven over medium heat, add shortening and brown the pot roast until nicely colored on all sides. Remove the roast from the pot and set aside.
4. Add salt to taste.
5. Stir in barbecue sauce (your choice), apple cider vinegar, onions, and okra. Return the roast to the pot.
6. Cover and cook slowly for 3-4 hours or until meat is tender.
7. Adjust seasoning with additional salt if needed before serving.
